summary: Athlete Settings Page testing completed. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All 6 sections verified (Personal Info, Gmail Integration, Notifications, Appearance, Change Password, Data & Privacy). Gmail OAuth auth_url generation tested. Gmail Consent Modal verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Gmail OAuth requires actual Google consent flow - auth_url generation tested but actual connect requires real Google credentials
Gmail Import endpoints (POST /import-history, GET /status, POST /confirm) require Gmail connected - API structure and error handling verified
All sections have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Delete account validation correctly requires exact 'DELETE' confirmation text
Password change properly validates current password with bcrypt
Export data returns athlete profile, programs, coaches, interactions, and events
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing athlete account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully verified. All 6 sections working: Personal Info (name/email edit + save), Gmail Integration (Connect button + Consent Modal), Notifications (Follow-up Reminders + Email Notifications toggles), Appearance (Dark/Light/System theme buttons), Change Password (validation + bcrypt check), Data & Privacy (Inbound Scan toggle, Export Data download, Delete Account validation). Gmail OAuth generates valid Google auth_url. Gmail Import endpoints return proper errors when not connected.

Backend_APIs.PUT_athlete_settings: PASS - updates name, email, theme, notifications
Backend_APIs.POST_change_password: PASS - validates current password, requires 6+ chars
Backend_APIs.GET_export_data: PASS - returns athlete, programs, coaches, interactions, events
Backend_APIs.POST_gmail_disconnect: PASS - returns ok even if not connected
Backend_APIs.POST_gmail_send: PASS - logs email as fallback when Gmail not connected

Frontend_Settings_Page.personal_info_section: PASS - name/email inputs, Save Changes button
Frontend_Settings_Page.gmail_consent_modal: PASS - opens on Connect click, Cancel/Accept buttons
Frontend_Settings_Page.notifications_section: PASS - Follow-up Reminders and Email Notifications toggles
Frontend_Settings_Page.change_password_section: PASS - Current/New/Confirm inputs, Update Password button
Frontend_Settings_Page.data_privacy_section: PASS - Inbound Scan toggle, Export Data button, Delete Account
Frontend_Settings_Page.toggle_interactions: PASS - toggles update preferences via API

mocked_apis.Gmail_OAuth_Callback: REQUIRES ACTUAL GOOGLE CONSENT - auth_url generated but callback needs real Google OAuth flow
mocked_apis.Gmail_Import: REQUIRES GMAIL CONNECTION - endpoints return 403 when Gmail not connected
